title: SQL: INSERT...SELECT on column subset
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name NVARCHAR(100), age INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
CREATE TABLE test2 (x INTEGER, y NVARCHAR(255), z BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO test2 (y) SELECT name FROM test1 WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test2 (x, y) SELECT age, name FROM test1 WHERE age < 30;
INSERT INTO test2 (y) SELECT COALESCE(name, 'Unknown') FROM test1;
key_bug_features: INSERT...SELECT on column subset in SQL
